subcodes.first_line: It is evident that the favors of the Truth surpass all blessings, and in the attainment by the servant of this exalted station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: معلوم است که عنایات حق فوق جمیع نعما است و در وصول عبد باین رتبه عالیه
subcodes.subjects: @nearness to God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
